Name: FEmitterDynamicParameter
Description: Helper structure for displaying the parameter.

Variables.Name: ParamName
Variables.Description: The parameter name - from the material DynamicParameter expression. READ-ONLY

Variables.Name: bUseEmitterTime
Variables.Description: If true, use the EmitterTime to retrieve the value, otherwise use Particle RelativeTime.

Variables.Name: bSpawnTimeOnly
Variables.Description: If true, only set the value at spawn time of the particle, otherwise update each frame.

Variables.Name: ValueMethod
Variables.Description: Where to get the parameter value from.

Variables.Name: bScaleVelocityByParamValue
Variables.Description: If true, scale the velocity value selected in ValueMethod by the evaluated ParamValue.

Variables.Name: ParamValue
Variables.Description: The distriubtion for the parameter value.
